articles.title: Trump's SAVE America Act to face first official test vote in Senate - Fox News
articles.description: President Donald Trump is leaning on Republican holdouts in the Senate in hopes to secure their support in a Senate test vote on his SAVE America Act on Tuesday, which would require proof of citizenship to vote in U.S. elections.
articles.content:
Senate Republicans are gearing up for a floor fight this week over doomed Trump-backed voter ID legislation.
Senate Majority Leader John Thune, R-S.D., is expected to launch the GOPs floor strategy … [+1670 chars]

articles.title: What are your questions about treatment of high cholesterol in younger people? - CNN
articles.description: Treating high cholesterol should start sooner, even among people in their 30s, according to new guidelines from the American College of Cardiology, the American Heart Association and other medical groups.
